# Test tools response parsing
cat > tools_response.json << 'EOF'
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "result": {
    "tools": [
      {
        "name": "calculator",
        "description": "A simple calculator tool",
        "inputSchema": {
          "type": "object",
          "properties": {
            "operation": {
              "type": "string",
              "description": "The operation to perform"
            },
            "a": {
              "type": "number",
              "description": "First operand"
            },
            "b": {
              "type": "number",
              "description": "Second operand"
            }
          },
          "required": ["operation", "a", "b"]
        }
      }
    ]
  }
}
EOF

# Process tools response
exec mcptrace2gostruct -package tools tools_response.json
stdout 'package tools'
stdout 'CalculatorInput struct'
stdout 'A float64'
stdout 'Operation string'
stdout 'B float64'
! stderr 'ERROR'
